# netbox_vlan (Data Source)

Fetches a single VLAN from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single VLAN by ID.
data "netbox_vlan" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "vlan_name" {
  value = data.netbox_vlan.example.name
}

output "vlan_vid" {
  value = data.netbox_vlan.example.vid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the VLAN.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the VLAN.
- `group_id` (Number) The ID of the VLAN group this VLAN belongs to.
- `name` (String) Name of the VLAN.
- `status` (String) The status of the VLAN.
- `vid` (Number) VLAN ID (1-4094).
